## ✅ PR Checklist

### Code quality
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide and conventions
- [ ] No unnecessary commented-out code or debug statements left in
- [ ] Complex logic is commented / documented
- [ ] No hardcoded values that should be config or constants

### Review readiness
- [ ] Self-reviewed this PR before requesting review
- [ ] PR is scoped to a single concern (not mixing unrelated changes)
- [ ] PR title follows the project's commit/PR naming convention
- [ ] Branch is up to date with the target branch

### Safety & impact
- [ ] No breaking changes introduced — or breaking changes are clearly documented below
- [ ] Database migrations (if any) are backwards-compatible or flagged
- [ ] Environment variables / secrets are not hardcoded
- [ ] Dependencies added/updated are justified and reviewed for security

---
